name: h-series-skills
description: Skills for the H-Series, a family of Hedera services for the agentic economy. Connect one hosted MCP server for the whole suite (registry, proof-of-execution, authorization, transport, egress control, standing, rings, wallet posture), with deep-dives on the client-side flows (signing, x402 payment, zero-code receipt anchoring).

plugins.name: h-series
plugins.description: Work with the whole H-Series suite on Hedera through one hosted MCP server: discover/register agentic services (H-Index), prove execution (H-Seal), scoped authorization (H-Grant), agent transport (H-Relay), egress control (H-Gate), standing (H-Cert), rings (H-Pact), and wallet posture (H-Scope). Built on Hedera Consensus Service.
